name: DigiSAC - KB Fallback + OpenClaw + Ticket + Agendamento

parameters.jsCode: const src = $json.message_text || $json.text || ''; const norm = String(src).toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'_').replace(/^_+|_+$/g,'').slice(0,80); return [{json:{...$json, knowledge_key: norm || 'fallback_generico'}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ protocol: $('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.protocol, customer_id: $('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.customer_id, customer_name: $('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.customer_name, message_text: $('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.message_text, event_type: $('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.event_type || 'message', contact: { contactId: $('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.contactId || '', serviceId: $('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.serviceId || '', ambiguous_contact: false, contact_count: Number($('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.contact_count || 0) }, contexto: $('Code - Load JSON State V2').item.json.contexto }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const fs = require('fs'); const path='/tmp/n8n_kb_estado.json'; let db={kb:{}, estado:{}}; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { try { db = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')); } catch(e){} } const key=$('Code - Load JSON State').item.json.correlation_key; const prev=db.estado[key] || {attempt_count:0,resolved:false,ticket_created:false,schedule_started:false}; const next=(prev.attempt_count||0)+1; db.estado[key]={...prev, protocol:$('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.protocol, numero:$('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.customer_id, attempt_count:next, updated_at:new Date().toISOString()}; fs.writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(db,null,2)); return [{json:{...$json, attempt_count:next, state:db.estado[key]}}];

const base = $("Code - Extrair ContactId").item.json; const tagsArr = Array.isArray($json.tags) ? $json.tags : []; const tags = tagsArr.map(t => t.label).filter(Boolean); const bot_on = tags.includes("BOT:ON"); const statusTag = tags.find(t => String(t).startsWith("STATUS:")) || "STATUS:INICIO"; const status = String(statusTag).replace("STATUS:",""); return [{json:{...base, tags, bot_on, status}}];

nodes.name: HTTP Request - Get Contact By Phone

parameters.jsCode: const arr = ($json.data || []); const first = Array.isArray(arr) ? (arr[0] || {}) : {}; const contactId = first.id || ""; const tags = Array.isArray(first.tags) ? first.tags.map(t => t.label).filter(Boolean) : []; const bot_on = tags.includes("BOT:ON"); const statusTag = tags.find(t => String(t).startsWith("STATUS:")) || "STATUS:INICIO"; const status = String(statusTag).replace("STATUS:",""); return [{json:{...$("Set - Normalizar Payload").item.json, contactId, tags, bot_on, status, serviceId:first.serviceId || "", contact_name_real:first.name || $("Set - Normalizar Payload").item.json.customer_name}}];

const base = $("Code - Extrair ContactId").item.json; const tags = (base.tags || []).filter(t => !String(t).startsWith("STATUS:")); return [{json:{...base, tagLabels:[...tags, "STATUS:AGUARDANDO_IDENTIFICACAO"]}}];

const prev = $("Code - Build Tags STATUS INICIO").item.json; const wanted = prev.tagLabels || []; const payload = $json.data || $json.items || $json || []; const rows = Array.isArray(payload) ? payload : (Array.isArray(payload.data) ? payload.data : []); const map = new Map(rows.map(t => [t.label || t.name, t.id])); const tagIds = wanted.map(label => map.get(label)).filter(Boolean); return [{json:{...prev, tagIds, listedTags: rows}}];

nodes.name: HTTP Request - Get Contact Tags DigiSAC

parameters.jsCode: const base = $json; const status = base.status || base.status_decisao || "INICIO"; let decisao = { status, intent: "unknown", responder_ao_cliente: true, mensagem: "", confidence: 0.8, usar_resposta_pronta: true, kb_item_id: null, precisa_identificacao: false, abrir_ticket: false, agendar: false, handoff_humano: false, motivo: "estado_atual" }; if (status === "INICIO") { decisao = { ...decisao, mensagem: "Para eu seguir com seu atendimento, me informe seu nome e empresa.", precisa_identificacao: true, kb_item_id: "kb_identificacao_001" }; } else if (status === "AGUARDANDO_IDENTIFICACAO") { decisao = { ...decisao, mensagem: "Pode me descrever melhor o problema?", status: "TRIAGEM", kb_item_id: "kb_triagem_001" }; } else if (status === "AGUARDANDO_VALIDACAO") { decisao = { ...decisao, mensagem: "Problema resolvido? Responda 1 para sim ou 2 para não.", kb_item_id: "kb_validacao_001" }; } return [{json:{...base, decisao}}];
const base = $("Code - Build Tags STATUS INICIO").item.json; return [{json:{...base}}];

parameters.jsCode: const fs = require('fs'); const path='/tmp/n8n_kb_estado.json'; let db={kb:{}, estado:{}}; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { try { db = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')); } catch(e){} } const key=$('Code - Load JSON State').item.json.correlation_key; const prev=db.estado[key] || {attempt_count:0,resolved:false,ticket_created:false,schedule_started:false}; const next=(prev.attempt_count||0)+1; db.estado[key]={...prev, protocol:$('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.protocol, numero:$('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.customer_id, attempt_count:next, updated_at:new Date().toISOString()}; fs.writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(db,null,2)); return [{json:{...$json, attempt_count:next, state:db.estado[key]}}];

const fs = require('fs'); const path='/tmp/n8n_kb_estado.json'; let db={kb:{}, estado:{}}; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { try { db = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')); } catch(e){} } const protocol=$('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.protocol || ''; const numero=$('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.customer_id || ''; const correlation_key=`${protocol}::${numero}`; const src=$('Set - Normalizar Payload').item.json.message_text||''; const low=String(src).trim().toLowerCase(); const blocked=['oi','ola','olá','ok','blz','bom dia','boa tarde','boa noite']; const quality_ok = String(src).trim().length >= 12 && !blocked.includes(low); const state=db.estado[correlation_key] || {attempt_count:0,resolved:false,ticket_created:false,ticket_id:'',schedule_started:false}; const intent=$('Code - Gerar Chave KB').item.json.knowledge_key || 'fallback_generico'; const stage='fallback_openclaw'; const kb_key=`${intent}::${stage}`; const hit=db.kb[kb_key] || null; return [{json:{...$json, db_path:path, correlation_key, quality_ok, intent, stage, kb_key, answer_found:!!hit, kb_record:hit, state, already_resolved:!!state.resolved}}];

const fs = require('fs'); const path='/tmp/n8n_kb_estado.json'; let db={kb:{}, estado:{}}; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { try { db = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')); } catch(e){} } const key=$json.kb_key || `${$json.intent}::${$json.stage}`; db.kb[key]={intent:$json.intent,stage:$json.stage || 'fallback_openclaw',mensagem:$json.mensagem,resolved:!!$json.resolved,origem:'openclaw',created_at:new Date().toISOString()}; fs.writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(db,null,2)); return [{json:$json}];

const base = $("Code - Extrair ContactId").item.json; const tagsArr = Array.isArray($json.tags) ? $json.tags : []; const tags = tagsArr.map(t => t.label).filter(Boolean); const bot_on = tags.includes("BOT:ON"); const statusTag = tags.find(t => String(t).startsWith("STATUS:")) || "STATUS:INICIO"; const status = String(statusTag).replace("STATUS:",""); return [{json:{...base, tags, bot_on, status}}];
